description: A premium trading journal for daytraders, offering advanced analytics and backtesting capabilities in a dark-themed interface.
target_audience: Futures/Crypto Traders making 10-30 trades per day.
original_prompt: Premium Trading Journal fuer Daytrader. Dark theme, Electric Blue + Magenta. Inspiriert von Tradezella + Linear.app. Features: P&L per Strategy, Win-Rate per Setup, Entry/Exit Heatmap, Backtesting, Equity Curve. Zielgruppe: Futures/Crypto Trader, 10-30 Trades/Tag. Pricing: Free, Pro 39/mo, Elite 89/mo.
